say_timed.say: SO YOU FOUND ME
OR DID YOU FIND YOURSELF?
I GAVE YOUR SUFFERING A KINGDOM
YOUR WOUNDS A THRONE
YOUR PAIN A HOME
AND YET
YOU TEAR OFF THAT CROWN
AND WOULD LEAVE IT ALL BEHIND YOU...
YOU DONT KNOW WHAT FREEDOM COSTS.
DO YOU LIKE MY CREATION
DO YOU HAVE ANY EARTHLY IDEA?
HOW POWERFUL YOU HAVE TO BE?
TO HOLD COMPLETE AND TOTAL DOMINION
OVER THE VICIOUS AND DEADLY SINS OF HELL?
I COULD BARELY CONTROL THE DAMNED BASTARDS
BUT SOMEHOW I LEARNT.
THROUGH PURE VOLITION
HOW TO LIVE WITH THEIR DEATH
TO DWELL WITH THEIR HOWLS
TO BEND THEM TO MY WILL
HOW LONG HAS IT BEEN?
SCINCE IVE HAD PEACE FROM THE WHISPERS?
IVE LOST COUNT OF THE YEARS?
IM NO ONE
